title: Adapting to Weather
description: Create an adaptive farming system that responds to changing conditions - master conditional programming.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Real farms must adapt to weather! Let's simulate this. Create variables for: weather, soil_quality, and water_level.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So these variables represent environmental conditions?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Your code will read these variables and make smart decisions based on conditions.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Now you have environmental data to work with.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Different weather suits different crops. Use if/elif/else to plant wheat in sunny weather, carrots in rainy weather, etc.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So my code checks the weather variable and decides which crop?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Adaptive farming based on environmental data!

objectives.description: Use elif for multiple weather conditions

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: My code adapts to the environment!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Now let's add resource management.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Resources like water and fertilizer shouldn't be wasted. Use conditionals to decide when to use them based on soil_quality and water_level!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So only fertilize if soil quality is low, and only water if water level is low?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Perfect reasoning! Efficient resource management through conditionals!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Conditionals prevent waste and optimize resource use!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Exactly! Now for the ultimate challenge!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Final challenge! Create a complete adaptive farm that checks weather, manages resources, selects crops, and farms efficiently using conditionals!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: What do I need to accomplish?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Your goal: harvest 10 wheat crops with your adaptive system! Use conditionals to make smart decisions. Plant, grow, and harvest to complete the challenge!

objectives.description: Harvest 10 wheat crops using adaptive conditional logic

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I built a complete adaptive farming system! It responds to everything!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Outstanding! You've mastered conditionals. But what if you need to repeat operations hundreds of times?

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: There's a better way—loops! He's the loop expert!

rewards.description: Unlocked quest: Repeating Until Done - While Loops
